description: Root-cause-related factor classification for aviation incident narratives.
dataset_provenance_note: Local frozen NASA ASRS/SIAM 2007 benchmark snapshot used for aviation demonstration benchmarking.
limitation_note: Outputs are likely root-cause-related factors for analyst decision support and do not establish definitive causality.
responsible_use_note: Decision support only; requires human analyst review and must not be used as a certified operational safety decision system.
